recommendations.title: Polar
recommendations.overview: When a retiring assassin realizes that he is the target of a hit, he winds up back in the game going head to head with a gang of younger, ruthless killers.

recommendations.title: Lords of Chaos
recommendations.overview: A teenager's quest to launch Norwegian Black Metal in Oslo in the 1990s results in a very violent outcome.

recommendations.title: Small Apartments
recommendations.overview: When a clumsy deadbeat accidentally kills his landlord, he must do everything in his power to hide the body, only to find that the distractions of lust, the death of his beloved brother, and a crew of misfit characters force him on a journey where a

recommendations.title: Horsemen
recommendations.overview: A recently widowed detective still grieving over his wife's death discovers a shocking connection between himself and the suspects in a serial killing spree linked to the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Taylor Swift: The 1989 World Tour - Live
recommendations.overview: Filmed in front of 76,000 fans at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, Australia, "The 1989 World Tour Live" captures Taylor Swift's entire performance while also mixing in behind-the-scene, rehearsal, and special guest footage from her 1989 Tour.

recommendations.title: Lemonade
recommendations.overview: The second "visual album" (a collection of short films) by Beyoncé, this time around she takes a piercing look at racial issues and feminist concepts through a sexualized, satirical, and solemn tone.
recommendations.director: Kahlil Joseph, Melina Matsoukas, Dikayl Rimmasch, Mark Romanek, Beyoncé, Todd Tourso, Jonas Åkerlund

recommendations.title: Straw Dogs
recommendations.overview: David Sumner, a mild-mannered academic from the United States, marries Amy, an Englishwoman. In order to escape a hectic stateside lifestyle, David and his wife relocate to the small town in rural Cornwall where Amy was raised. There, David is ostrac

recommendations.title: A Coffee in Berlin
recommendations.overview: Niko, a twenty-something college dropout, lives for the moment as he drifts through the streets of Berlin, curiously observing everyone around him and oblivious to his growing status as an outsider. Then on one fateful day, through a series of absurd

recommendations.title: Boiler Room
recommendations.overview: A college dropout gets a job as a broker for a suburban investment firm and is on the fast track to success—but the job might not be as legitimate as it sounds.

recommendations.title: Get the Gringo
recommendations.overview: A career criminal nabbed by Mexican authorities is placed in a tough prison where he learns to survive with the help of a 9-year-old boy.
